title: Sharing dashboards with link instead of PDF
excerpt:
Description
I would like to share a dashboard with my clients via a link in an weekly email.  Currently I share a pdf but that info is outdated by the time they receive it.  A link would be “live” and up to day any time …

posts.author: gksbas (Ginger Scott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would like to share a dashboard with my clients via a link in an weekly email. Currently I share a pdf but that info is outdated by the time they receive it. A link would be “live” and up to day any time they viewed it. Apparently dashboards are not able to be shared via link if the user doen’t have a log in. I don’t understand the vulnerability since we can share a pdf and that would not be any different than a view only link. Will this be available soon. I have already used the chat bot and texted with a human and was told to bring my suggestion to this community.

What are you trying to achieve

Transparency with my clients/team that is up to date and less hassle that creating and connecting a weekly pdf

posts.author: xavier65frans (xavier)
posts.cookedHtml:
gksbas:

I would like to share a dashboard with my clients via a link in an weekly email. Currently I share a pdf but that info is outdated by the time they receive it. A link would be “live” and up to day any time they viewed it. Apparently dashboards are not able to be shared via link if the user doen’t have a log in. I don’t understand the vulnerability since we can share a pdf and that would not be any different than a view only link. Will this be available soon. I have already used the chat bot and texted with a human and was told to bring my suggestion to this community.

Hello,

you’re absolutely right that sharing a PDF of your dashboard is basically the same thing as sharing a view-only link in terms of sensitivity. The difference is interactivity and timeliness, which is why a link would be so valuable for your weekly email.
